programs.title: Board Exam Preparation
programs.description: Comprehensive coaching for Class 10 and Class 12 board examinations (CBSE/ICSE/State Boards). We ensure students not only score high in boards but also build a strong foundation for competitive exams. Our approach combines thorough NCERT coverage with regular mock tests modeled on actual board patterns.
programs.eligibility: Students of Class 9, 10, 11, and 12 preparing for board examinations.

programs.title: JEE Main & Advanced Preparation
programs.description: Rigorous and strategic coaching for JEE Main and JEE Advanced — India's most competitive engineering entrance exams. We cover Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics with deep conceptual clarity, problem-solving techniques, and exam strategy built over years of experience.
programs.eligibility: Students of Class 11 and 12, and droppers targeting IIT/NIT admissions.

programs.title: NEET Preparation
programs.description: Comprehensive NEET preparation covering Biology (Botany & Zoology), Chemistry, and Physics. We place special emphasis on NCERT mastery since NEET questions are directly NCERT-based, alongside systematic practice of previous year questions and full-length mock tests.
programs.eligibility: Students of Class 11 and 12, and droppers targeting MBBS/BDS admissions.

programs.title: NTSE Preparation
programs.description: Specialized coaching for the National Talent Search Examination — one of India's most prestigious scholarship exams for Class 10 students. We cover both the Mental Ability Test (MAT) and Scholastic Aptitude Test (SAT) with targeted practice and scholarship guidance.
programs.eligibility: Students of Class 9 and 10 appearing for NTSE Stage 1 and Stage 2.

programs.title: KVPY / Foundation Program
programs.description: Our Foundation Program is designed for students from Class 8 to 10 who wish to build a strong academic foundation and develop scientific aptitude for future competitive exams. We also prepare students for KVPY and Science Olympiads.
programs.eligibility: Students of Class 8, 9, and 10 with an interest in science and competitive scholarships.
